meta-description: Learn about network plans by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Network plan
excerpt: A health plan that contracts with doctors, hospitals, pharmacies, and other health care providers to provide members of the plan with services and supplies at a discounted price.
content: A health plan that contracts with doctors, hospitals, pharmacies, and other health care providers to provide members of the plan with services and supplies at a discounted price.
